summary: Excellent matrix recording captures a fiery Halloween second set – Shakedown Street, Estimated Prophet/Eyes of the World and more blaze with crystal‑clear sound.
review: The matrix source blends board clarity with audience ambience to deliver an outstanding listening experience, with a distinct high‑end that lets every instrument shine. The show itself is highlighted by an unstoppable second set – Halloween energy, scorching Shakedown Street, a legendary Estimated Prophet → Eyes of the World transition and a hot Ramble On Rose – making it one of the season’s standouts.

ai_rating.rationale: Nearly all reviews are 5‑star, praising both performance and recording; only a single 3‑star note is an outlier, yielding an average of ~4.7 which translates to a strong combined rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Combines soundboard detail with crowd ambience; distinct high‑end, crisp and clear throughout, no reported dropouts or muddiness.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Halloween atmosphere fuels a non‑stop, high‑energy second set; transitions (e.g., Estimated → Eyes) flow seamlessly and the crowd’s excitement is captured throughout.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Possibly switched to his Wolf guitar for the second set, delivering molten, abandon‑filled solos with a fiery tone.
band_member_comments.Bob: His onstage jokes were noted (hilariously unfunny), but no specific performance comments.
